metadata.notes: Static GitHub Pages data layer. Use as DivGaming source of truth for reference pages; validate/expand over time.

items.name: Core Weapon Damage
items.description: Every weapon has weapon damage as its core scaling value.

items.name: Weapon-Type Damage
items.description: Brand bonuses and specialization/build choices can increase AR, SMG, rifle, MMR, shotgun, LMG, or pistol damage.

items.name: Damage to Armor / Health / Out of Cover
items.description: Common high-value attributes used to improve real target damage depending on enemy state.

items.name: Critical Chance / Critical Damage / Headshot Damage
items.description: Primary red-build scaling choices for sustained DPS and precision builds.

items.name: Handling, Accuracy, Stability, Reload, RPM, Magazine
items.description: Weapon feel and sustained-fire attributes that support different archetypes.
